content: Components must be pure renderers — no direct API calls, no business logic. Data fetching lives in custom hooks, server state managed exclusively through TanStack Query, client UI state in Zustand stores.
Use Parameter Object Pattern for functions with more than one argument. Positional params only for trivial cases (e.g., clamp(value, min, max)). Use default values in destructured parameters.
Always use object destructuring when accessing object properties. Destructure function parameters when accessing multiple properties. Destructure in assignments, not just declarations.

Never use 'any' — use 'unknown' with type guards. All functions must have explicit return types. No inline type definitions. No magic strings — use literal unions or constants. Use 'import type' for type-only imports. Discriminated unions over boolean flags.

name: Frontend data flow
description: pages/ → hooks/ → api/ → backend REST/WS. pages/ → stores/. Components render only. hooks/ orchestrate api/, ws/, stores/. api/ contains REST client functions only. ws/ contains WebSocket client only. stores/ hold client-side UI state only (selected items, panel visibility), not server state.

name: vite-react-ts-bootstrap
description: Vite+React+TypeScript frontend: bun create vite --template react-ts, then bun add for all deps. tsconfig.app.json needs baseUrl and paths for @/ alias. verbatimModuleSyntax:true requires import type. Prettier lint script: prettier --check 'src/**/*.{ts,tsx}'. typecheck script: tsc --noEmit.

name: shadcn-manual-setup
description: shadcn/ui without CLI: install @radix-ui primitives individually, create components/ui/*.tsx manually using cva+cn(). tailwindcss@3 + tailwindcss-animate + CSS variables in index.css. components.json sets style:new-york, baseColor:zinc.

name: phase2-screen-structure
description: Projects/Dashboard/Settings screens: pages/ orchestrate via hooks, components/ are pure renderers. Projects: useProjects+useProjectStorage, inline detail panel drawer (not right-drawer), AlertDialog for delete. Dashboard: useSystemHealth for resource card, ProjectSelector combobox pattern. Settings: useSettings+useUpdateSettings+useTestAiConnection into SettingsForm. API: api/client.ts has fetchApi<T>+ApiError; per-resource files are thin wrappers. gitignore has 'projects/' so components/projects/ needs git add -f.
